reasoning: The document must be rejected due to a critical programmatic defect involving retained header and footer artifacts across all 5 pages, which severely disrupts screen reader navigation. Additionally, there are major accessibility issues including truncated and placeholder image alt text, as well as flattened lists with mixed numbering types. Despite high LLM fidelity scores, these verified structural and accessibility failures trigger an automatic rejection.

concerns.description:
Header/footer elements retained in output (5): State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Waste Mana; Meeting Officer's Report
Coal Ash Impoundment Classification; Meeting Officer’s Report
Coal Ash Impoundment Classification
concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=5, pages_affected=5/5. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML across most pages — pervasive pipeline failure. Screen readers will encounter duplicate artifacts on every page.

concerns.description: Mixed numbering types at same list level (2 list(s)): p1:letter+roman, p5:letter+roman — possible sub-point flattening
concerns.analysis: flat_lists=2. Lists with mixed numbering types (numeric+letter or numeric+roman) at the same depth level suggest sub-points were flattened.

concerns.description: Incomplete image alt text: 2 image(s) with inadequate descriptions (1 truncated mid-sentence, 1 generic placeholder(s)) — e.g. p1: "...ing from green to dark blue with a white pine tree"; p1: "Unidentified image"
concerns.analysis: incomplete_alt_text=2 (truncated=1, placeholder=1, empty=0). Per WCAG 2.1 AA, meaningful images must have descriptive alternative text for screen-reader accessibility.

The source PDF uses underlining for emphasis on the lead-in terms for each bulleted item in Section II and Section III (e.g., 'Excavation', 'Groundwater Assessments', 'Well Testing'). The extraction JSON does not preserve this underline formatting.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
Excavation – Speakers requested... 
Groundwater Assessments – The speakers... 
Well Testing - Speakers requested...

Groundwater Assessments – The speakers...

concerns.location: Sections II and III (Pages 3-5), bulleted list items

action_items: Remove repeated header/footer artifacts from the HTML body
Fix truncated and placeholder alt text for images
Restore proper hierarchical structure to nested lists
Restore underline emphasis on list terms
